compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Dread X Collection: The Hunt
- Steam AppID of the game: 1569550

## System Information
- GPU: AMD Radeon RX 5700
- Driver/LLVM version: Mesa 23.0.0-git
- Kernel version: 5.17.9-302.fsync.fc36.x86_64
- Proton Version: proton-7.0-2

[system_info.txt](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/8794360/system_info.txt)

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

## Symptoms

Dread X Collection: The Hunt is a collection of short games.

"Axis Mundi" has a corrupt intro video #1464

"The Fruit" crashes the display driver, unable to recover and having to do a hard reset (I did see that someone else on ProtonDB with AMD GPU has reported a similar thing). 

## Reproduction

Axis Mundi:
- Select Start Game > Free Play Mode
- Select the "PH" report on the board to launch "Axis Mundi"
![Screenshot_20220529_225059](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/43387963/170892437-d2dd8328-b11d-4714-968c-d85b3bdc6254.png)
- Start new game, and you will see a corrupted intro video:
![Screenshot_20220529_225209](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/43387963/170892469-6331f3b9-2ff0-459d-8b69-7ec02e61e277.png)
[steam-1569550-AxisMundi.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/8794359/steam-1569550-AxisMundi.log)

I was able to fix the video by setting launch option
"WINE_DO_NOT_CREATE_DXGI_DEVICE_MANAGER=1 %command%"

The Fruit:
- Select Start Game > Free Play Mode
- Select report on the board to launch "The Fruit"
- Start the game
- Bring up the lantern (press 4) and walk forward until you reach a bridge, after the bridge enter the shed to the left. Move the barrels and look at the picture hidden behind one of them. Read the note on the table. Exit the shed and follow the road forward (it will start raining). The display driver will crash just before you reach a village. 

Note that triggering the crash appears to be very specific (I have been able to replicate the problem three times in a row doing the steps above), if you just walk forward (without taking the detour entering the shed etc..). The driver does not crash. 

Log of playing the Fruit until it crashes:
[steam-1569550-fruit.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/8794358/steam-1569550-fruit.log)
symptom_summary:
用户在玩《Dread X Collection: The Hunt》时遇到的问题包括“Axis Mundi”的开场视频损坏，以及在玩“The Fruit”时显示驱动崩溃，导致无法恢复并需要强制重启。 

Tags: Video Corruption, Driver Crash, Hard Reset

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Need for Speed Rivals
- Steam AppID of the game: 1262600

## System Information
- GPU: RX 6600
- Video driver version: 4.6 (Compatibility Profile) Mesa 23.2.1-1ubuntu3.1~22.04.2
- Kernel version: 6.8.6 tried 5.15 and 6.5 (any one don't work)
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): https://gist.github.com/Revenarius/89687db8b24cfe9980ba63df79ceddf0
- Proton version: 9.2 and Experimental.

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

<!-- Please add `PROTON_LOG=1 %command%` to the game's launch options and
attach the generated $HOME/steam-$APPID.log to this issue report as a file.
(Proton logs compress well if needed.)--> Dont work

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
I installed the game on the 6th of August and played it without any problems until the 8th, a total of 3 hours. On the 8th the game received a 128MB update and from then on I can't get into the game. It starts, but in a window; if I click on it to enter, it goes full screen, but I can't press "enter" to start. The mouse doesn't work, and no system for switching windows is valid (neither alt-tab, nor alt-F4, nor crtl-alt-supr....) I have to press the PC button and press Alt-R or alt-A to restart or shut down.

## Reproduction


<!--
1. You can find the Steam AppID in the URL of the shop page of the game.
   e.g. for `The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt` the AppID is `292030`.
2. You can find your driver and Linux version, as well as your graphics
   processor's name in the system information report of Steam.
3. You can retrieve a full system information report by clicking
   `Help` > `System Information` in the Steam client on your machine.
4. Please copy it to your clipboard by pressing `Ctrl+A` and then `Ctrl+C`.
   Then paste it in a [Gist](https://gist.github.com/) and post the link in
   this issue.
5. Also, please copy the contents of `Help` > `Steam Runtime Diagnostics` to
   the gist.
6. Please search for open issues and pull requests by the name of the game and
   find out whether they are relevant and should be referenced above.
-->

# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Warhammer 40,000: Darktide
- Steam AppID of the game: 1361210

## System Information
- GPU: <!-- e.g. RX 580 or GTX 970 --> RX 6800XT
- Driver/LLVM version: <!-- e.g. Mesa 18.2/7.0.0 or nvidia 396.54 --> mesa-git (23.1.0_devel.167197.a4fa4890026-1)
- Kernel version: <!-- e.g. 4.17 --> 6.2.0
- Proton version: Proton GE  7-49, Proton Exp, Proton Exp Bleeding Edge

## I confirm:
- [ x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [ x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

[steam-1361210.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/10833304/steam-1361210.log)


## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->

As of latest game update (1.0.31) it freezes, and crashes eventually after selecting your character.

_**Workaround:**_ It has apparently something to do with `Textures`. Setting `Textures` to `High` will reproduce that freeze and crash. 
Setting them to `Medium` or `Low` will make the game playable again.
symptom_summary:
用户在最新更新后（1.0.31）遇到游戏冻结和崩溃的问题，尤其是在选择角色后。将纹理设置为“高”会导致冻结和崩溃，而将其设置为“中”或“低”则可以正常游戏。

**Tags:** Freezes, Crashes, Visual Glitches, Texture Issues

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: `Walkabout Mini Golf`
- Steam AppID of the game: `1408230`

## System Information
- GPU: `RX 7900 XTX`
- Driver/LLVM version: `4.6 Mesa 22.3.3; LLVM 15.0.6-r1`
- Kernel version: `6.1.4-zen2-znver3-o3-pds`
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): https://gist.github.com/kzdixon/89c2e8be835357675ede275c054d9dc5
- Proton version: `Proton Experimental` and/or `Proton 7.0`

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

<!-- Please add `PROTON_LOG=1 %command%` to the game's launch options and
attach the generated $HOME/steam-$APPID.log to this issue report as a file.
(Proton logs compress well if needed.)-->

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->

Rendering position/placement for one eye is incorrect when using any SteamVR resolution above 100% for Walkabout Mini Golf. Anything below or equal to 100% resolution works as intended.

## Reproduction

1. Set SteamVR resolution to 150% (default for this GPU) for Valve Index
2. Launch Walkabout VR
3. See that right eye position/rendering is misplaced
4. Lower SteamVR resolution to 100% and open/close SteamVR dashboard twice to get it to trigger the resolution change
5. Game looks normal again
6. Switching back to anything above 100% and toggling SteamVR dashboard twice to reload the resolution change will cause the eye rendering to be wrong in the right eye again

<!--
1. You can find the Steam AppID in the URL of the shop page of the game.
   e.g. for `The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt` the AppID is `292030`.
7. You can find your driver and Linux version, as well as your graphics
   processor's name in the system information report of Steam.
8. You can retrieve a full system information report by clicking
   `Help` > `System Information` in the Steam client on your machine.
9. Please copy it to your clipboard by pressing `Ctrl+A` and then `Ctrl+C`.
   Then paste it in a [Gist](https://gist.github.com/) and post the link in
   this issue.
10. Please search for open issues and pull requests by the name of the game and
   find out whether they are relevant and should be referenced above.
-->

Besides this issue, the game runs flawlessly.
